defenses: Meter was malfunctioning, broken, or out of service at time of citation
Paid receipt or mobile app (ParkMobile/PayByPhone) confirmation showing valid payment
Citation was issued before the posted meter enforcement hours began
Vehicle was not parked beyond the time shown on the meter receipt or app confirmation
No parking sign was missing, obscured, damaged, or illegible at the time of the violation
Vehicle was parked outside the restricted hours or days posted on the sign
Conflicting signs at the location created genuine ambiguity about the restriction
Sign did not comply with MUTCD placement or spacing requirements

HYDRANT.description: Parking within 10 feet of a fire hydrant
defenses: Vehicle was parked more than 10 feet from the hydrant (measurement dispute)
Hydrant location was not clearly visible, marked, or painted at the curb
Vehicle was actively attended and would have moved immediately upon request
Hydrant was out of service or not a city-owned fire suppression hydrant
Vehicle was actively loading or unloading commercial goods at time of citation
No legal parking space was available within a reasonable distance
Vehicle was attended and immediately prepared to move upon request
Citation location description does not match the actual location of the vehicle

RESPMT.description: Parking in residential permit zone without permit
defenses: Vehicle displays a valid residential permit for that zone
Permit was properly displayed but may have been obscured or fallen
Vehicle is a visitor covered under the guest permit provisions
Block or zone designation on the sign was missing or illegible

SWPG.description: Street cleaning — parking prohibited during posted hours
defenses: Street cleaning sign was missing, damaged, or obscured at the posted location
Street cleaning did not actually occur on the cited date
Vehicle was moved before street cleaning operations began
Alternate side parking was officially suspended for a holiday or special event
Incorrect block or street address listed on the citation
Registration was renewed prior to or on the date of the violation
Renewal was pending due to an MVA processing delay beyond the owner's control
Documentation shows renewal application was submitted before the expiration date
Vehicle is registered in another state and was compliant under that state's rules
